title: Thailand Visa Exemption | Thai Immigration Bureau
content: US passport holders are exempt from visa requirements for stays of up to 60 days (air entry) and 30 days (land entry). Extension of 30 days available at local immigration office for fee of 1,900 THB. Land border entries limited to 2 per calendar year on visa exemption basis.

title: Thailand extends visa exemption to 60 days for multiple nationalities
content: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs announces that effective November 11, 2024, Thailand extends visa exemption from 30 to 60 days for passport holders of the United States and other designated countries.
